feature: Core Web Vitals and Mobile Performance Optimization
workflow_rationale: Adding new performance capabilities (lazy loading, modern image formats, Lighthouse CI) to improve Core Web Vitals metrics, especially on mobile devices. This is a feature workflow because we're implementing new performance features, not just refactoring existing code.

phases.name: Image Optimization
phases.description: Generate optimized WebP/AVIF images with responsive sizes and implement modern image loading patterns

subtasks.description: Run image optimization script to generate WebP and AVIF formats for all images

verification.command: node scripts/optimize-images.js && ls -la assets/images/optimized/ | grep -E '\.(webp|avif)$' | wc -l
verification.expected: Generated WebP and AVIF files exist in assets/images/optimized/

subtasks.notes: Script already exists, just needs to be executed to generate optimized images

subtasks.description: Add <picture> elements with WebP/AVIF sources for hero and LCP images

verification.expected: At least 1 picture element for hero/LCP image

subtasks.notes: Added responsive <picture> element for hero poster with AVIF, WebP, and JPEG sources with multiple sizes (480w, 768w, 1200w, 1920w). Includes LCP optimizations (loading='eager', fetchpriority='high')

subtasks.description: Add lazy loading, decoding=async, and proper sizing attributes to all below-fold images

verification.expected: Multiple lazy loading attributes on below-fold images

subtasks.notes: Added loading='lazy' and decoding='async' to footer logo. Added width/height to header logo for layout stability. Map iframes already had loading='lazy'. Total of 3 below-fold elements with lazy loading.

phases.name: HTML/CSS Optimization
phases.description: Optimize critical rendering path with fetchpriority, preload hints, and font optimization

subtasks.description: Add fetchpriority='high' to LCP image and preload critical assets
subtasks.notes: Added preload links for hero poster image (AVIF with responsive srcset) and critical CSS (redesign.css) with fetchpriority='high'. Hero image already had fetchpriority='high' attribute. Total of 2 fetchpriority attributes for optimal LCP.

subtasks.description: Optimize font loading with font-display: swap and subset only required glyphs

verification.expected: Google Fonts URL includes display=swap parameter

subtasks.notes: Updated Google Fonts link with display=swap parameter for font-display: swap CSS property. Added subset=latin to reduce font file size by only loading Latin glyphs. This prevents invisible text flash (FOIT) and improves rendering performance.

subtasks.description: Optimize hero video loading to not block LCP

verification.instructions: Check that hero video has preload='none' or 'metadata' instead of 'auto', and loads via Intersection Observer

subtasks.notes: Changed video preload from 'auto' to 'none' and removed autoplay attribute. Implemented Intersection Observer in main.js to lazy load video when it enters viewport (50px margin). Video now only loads when visible, significantly improving LCP and reducing initial page load bandwidth.

phases.name: JavaScript Optimization
phases.description: Defer non-critical JavaScript and optimize third-party script loading

subtasks.description: Add defer attribute to Leaflet CDN script and other non-critical scripts
subtasks.notes: Added defer attribute to Leaflet CDN script (line 76) and mobile-nav.js script (line 1192). This prevents these non-critical scripts from blocking HTML parsing, improving initial page load performance. Module scripts are already deferred by default, and inline scripts can't use defer.

subtasks.description: Optimize AOS animation library loading to reduce main thread blocking

verification.instructions: Verify AOS initializes after first paint using requestIdleCallback or setTimeout

subtasks.notes: Deferred AOS initialization using requestIdleCallback (with setTimeout fallback) to reduce main thread blocking and improve INP metric. AOS now initializes after first paint instead of during critical rendering.

subtasks.description: Update service worker to cache optimized images and implement stale-while-revalidate

verification.instructions: Check service worker caches WebP/AVIF images and uses stale-while-revalidate strategy

subtasks.notes: Added AVIF format support to image caching pattern. Service worker now caches WebP and AVIF optimized images using cache-first strategy with stale-while-revalidate (via updateCacheInBackground function). Background cache updates ensure fresh content while serving from cache.

phases.name: Measurement & Monitoring
phases.description: Set up Lighthouse CI for ongoing performance monitoring and meet Core Web Vitals targets

verification.expected: Lighthouse config exists with performance assertions

subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive .lighthouserc.js with mobile device emulation (375x667, 2x DPR), performance score threshold of 90+, Core Web Vitals targets (LCP < 2.5s, CLS < 0.1, TBT < 200ms), 4G mobile throttling, and 3 runs per URL for stable results

subtasks.description: Create script to run Lighthouse audits locally
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive Lighthouse audit script with server check, Core Web Vitals parsing, color-coded results, and helpful performance tips. Uses npx @lhci/cli to run audits against .lighthouserc.js configuration

subtasks.description: Run Lighthouse audit and verify mobile performance score is 90+
subtasks.notes: Dev server started on port 3001, Lighthouse config updated. All optimizations verified: hero poster preload with fetchpriority, <picture> elements, lazy loading, font-display=swap, deferred scripts, video preload=none, 100+ WebP/AVIF files, service worker caching. Sandbox limitations prevent npx execution - manual Lighthouse run required for final score: `node scripts/run-lighthouse.js`

subtasks.description: Add npm script for performance auditing
subtasks.notes: Add 'audit:performance' script to package.json for easy performance testing

parallel_groups.reason: Image optimization and JS optimization are independent and can run concurrently

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.3x faster with phase 1 and 3 parallelized, but single worker recommended for simplicity

acceptance_criteria: All images served in WebP/AVIF with responsive sizes
Hero video does not block first paint

verification_steps.name: Image Format Verification
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Multiple WebP and AVIF files generated

verification_steps.name: Manual Mobile Testing
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Fast load on mobile device/emulation, no layout shift, video loads smoothly

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk performance optimization requiring Lighthouse validation and manual mobile testing to ensure Core Web Vitals targets are met

checks: Hero section renders without layout shift
Page loads fast on mobile emulation
